jobs.description: Worked on a customer community portal where users could ask questions, other users could reply, and moderators managed content. Implemented features for upvoting queries, moderating discussions, and publishing newsletters to keep the community informed and engaged.

Worked on an ecommerce client project building a Shopify-like platform to unify multiple websites. Enabled users to upload products once and distribute them across sites while sharing common components and supporting custom design variations for different platforms.

Worked on multiple client projects using React and AG Grid to build interactive tables and charts. Developed features to display and analyze real time analytical data, enabling business users to monitor metrics, explore datasets, and make informed decisions.

Worked as an accessibility feature specialist for a customer facing web application built with React. Used JAWS and other accessibility testing tools to ensure compliance with standards, improve screen reader compatibility, and enhance usability for users with visual impairments.

Worked on .NET and React to build modern web applications for enterprise clients. Served as a team lead for two years, guiding developers and planning features while developing reliable internal analytics and visualization tools with capabilities similar to Tableau for business teams.
